title: Update kpod logs to use the new container state and runtime

comments.body: the --tail flag is still broken https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/16, but the tests pass (not sure why). Will get back to that later.
I don't like having the log parsing inside the runtime. I think we should move it either into cmd/kpod or into container.go. Otherwise looks fine.

:pushpin: Commit 2a51d53 has been approved by `rhatdan`
